retrieved_result: Average Temperatures for New Mexico in February Average temperatures for February at cities, towns, parks and lakes throughout New Mexico are listed below in degrees Fahrenheit and Celsius. The tables give the normals for maximum and minimum temperatures based on weather data collected from 1981 to 2010 by the US National Climatic Data Center. Yo
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses weather data for New Mexico and has no relevance to DIY room decoration ideas.
